landing.heroTitle: AI-powered calorie tracking and social recipe sharing.
landing.heroSubtitle: Snap a photo of your plate, let AI estimate the macros, set your goals and discover recipes shared by a passionate community.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need, nothing you don't.

ai.title: AI vision for your plate
ai.body: A single photo is enough. Gemini estimates calories, macros and even suggests a title and ingredients.

dashboard.title: A dashboard that speaks to you
dashboard.body: Daily goals, macros and a readable progress ring. No spreadsheets, no noise.

social.title: A warm community feed
social.body: Publish your recipes, save the ones you love, like, follow — nothing to prove, everything to share.

how.title: From photo to progress in 3 steps.

step1.title: Snap or pick a photo
step1.body: Drag & drop or choose a picture of your meal directly from your phone.

step2.title: Let AI do the math
step2.body: Gemini fills in calories and macros. Review and tweak if needed.

step3.title: Track and share
step3.body: Everything lands on your dashboard. Make it public to inspire the community.

cta.title: Start eating smarter today.
cta.body: Free during beta. No card required.

footer.madeWith: Built with Next.js, Supabase and Gemini.

panel.quote: “Concal turned my meals into data I actually understand.”

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue to your dashboard.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Two minutes to join, lifetime of better meals.
register.confirmInfo: Account created. If email confirmation is enabled, check your inbox before signing in.

loginErrors.authCallback: We couldn’t finish signing you in from that link (expired, already used, or incomplete). Request a new confirmation email or sign in if your account is already active.
loginErrors.invalidCredentials: Incorrect email or password. If you just signed up, open the confirmation link in your latest email first to activate your account, then try again — or check for typos.
loginErrors.emailNotConfirmed: Your email isn’t confirmed yet. Click the link in your inbox (check spam), then sign in.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Today at a glance.
dashboard.welcomeBody: Set your daily goals to unlock the full dashboard.

goal.title: Daily goals
goal.subtitle: Set your targets for today. You can edit them any time.

explore.title: Discover
explore.subtitle: Recipes from the community.
explore.empty: No public meal yet. Publish yours from “New meal.”

new.title: New meal
new.subtitle: Fill it in, or let AI do the heavy lifting.
new.sectionPhotoHelp: A picture is all the AI needs to estimate calories and macros.
new.sectionMacrosHelp: Per serving, edit if the AI missed something.
new.aiQuota: AI analysis limit reached (Google quota). Try again later, or enable billing for your Gemini API key in Google AI Studio.
new.mealSaved: Meal saved and added to today's log.
new.ingredientsHelp: Array of objects with at least `name`. `amount` and `unit` are optional.
new.dropHint: Drop an image or click to browse

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Stats and saved recipes.
profile.savedEmpty: No saved recipes yet. Explore the feed and bookmark one.
profile.mineEmpty: You haven't logged any meal yet.

errors.notFoundBody: This page doesn't exist or has moved.
